calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-18-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Valerie Papale. Petitioner Xiu Zhen Lei was sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter, Charles Zhang. Minor Jacky Lei also present. The Court takes judicial notice of Declarations filed by both Ex-husband, Yu Bo Huang and Xiu Zhen Lei, fiance of the Petitioner, Xiu Zhen Lei. The Court strongly suggested to the petitioner, through her interpreter, that she consult with an attorney and obtain from the family court a declaration showing the actual parentage is biological father. Changing the minor's name does not change what the law says as to his parentage. Petition denied.
